site.name: ef-sinn
home.hero.title: Where Art Meets Craftsmanship
home.hero.subtitle: Custom woodwork crafted with passion and precision
home.intro.title: Your Carpenter in Munich – Craft Perfection with Passion
home.intro.p1: As a carpentry workshop in Munich and Unterhaching, we create extraordinary custom furniture, fitted kitchens, parquet flooring and wooden installations with years of experience, making your space truly unique. Wood is our muse, and our creativity knows no bounds.
home.intro.p2: From laying parquet flooring to custom built-in wardrobes and kitchens, to furniture for special requirements – tables, beds, bathroom furniture and much more. Every project is executed with the utmost care and craftsmanship. Whether standard dimensions or custom requests: we find the perfect solution.
home.services.title: Our Services
home.services.subtitle: Quality and creativity in every detail
home.services.s1.title: Custom Furniture
home.services.s1.desc: Individual furniture that perfectly fits your space. Tables, beds, shelves and more – all crafted to your wishes.
home.services.s2.title: Kitchens & Wardrobes
home.services.s2.desc: Custom fitted kitchens and wardrobe solutions that perfectly unite functionality and aesthetics.
home.services.s3.title: Staircases
home.services.s3.desc: High-quality wooden staircases, individually crafted. From straight stairs to curved designs – executed with craft perfection.
home.services.s4.title: Wooden Terraces
home.services.s4.desc: Weather-resistant wooden terraces for your outdoor area. With or without a roof – durable and naturally beautiful.
home.services.s5.title: Parquet Flooring & Interior Fitting
home.services.s5.desc: Laying, sanding and sealing parquet flooring – solid parquet, engineered parquet and wide-plank boards. Plus wooden ceilings, wall cladding and complete interior fitting with wood.
home.services.s6.title: Repair & Restoration
home.services.s6.desc: Valuable furniture pieces deserve a second life. We restore and repair with care and expertise.
home.portfolio.title: Our Work
home.portfolio.subtitle: Glimpses of our handcrafted creations
home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
home.faq.subtitle: Answers to the most important questions about our carpentry work
home.faq.q1: What carpentry services does ef-sinn offer in Munich?
home.faq.q2: Does ef-sinn also lay parquet flooring in Munich?
home.faq.a2: Yes! We professionally lay parquet flooring in Munich and the surrounding area. We work with solid parquet, engineered parquet, wide-plank boards and strip parquet. We also offer parquet sanding, oiling and sealing – both for new installations and for refinishing existing floors.
home.faq.q3: Does ef-sinn build furniture for special requirements and custom requests?
home.faq.a3: Absolutely! Custom requests and special requirements are exactly our strength. Whether unusual dimensions, special wood types, barrier-free solutions, integrated technology or unconventional designs – every project is individually planned and crafted according to your wishes.
home.faq.q4: What does a carpenter charge for custom furniture in Munich?
home.faq.a4: The cost of custom furniture depends on material, size, complexity and surface finish. We create an individual and transparent quote for every project after a personal consultation. Contact us at info@ef-sinn.de or +49 176 8718 6451.
home.faq.q5: What is the difference between a Schreiner and a Tischler?
home.faq.a5: Schreiner and Tischler are two German terms for the same profession – carpenter or joiner. In Bavaria and southern Germany the term "Schreiner" is used, while in northern and eastern Germany "Tischler" is preferred. The training, skills and activities are identical. ef-sinn in Munich is your carpenter for custom woodwork.
home.faq.a6: ef-sinn is based in Munich and Unterhaching and serves customers throughout Munich, Unterhaching, Taufkirchen, Ottobrunn, Neubiberg, Oberhaching and the entire greater Munich/Upper Bavaria region.
home.faq.q7: How does a project with ef-sinn work?
home.faq.a7: Every project follows four steps: 1) Personal initial consultation, 2) Detailed planning with sketches, material selection and transparent cost estimation, 3) Production in our workshop with the highest precision, 4) Professional on-site assembly with final adjustments.
home.faq.q8: What wood types does ef-sinn use?
home.faq.a8: We work with a wide variety of high-quality wood types – oak, beech, ash, walnut, cherry and many more. We prefer regionally sourced and sustainably managed timber and are happy to advise you on the ideal wood choice for your project.
home.cta.title: Ready for your custom project?
home.cta.text: Let us turn your ideas into handcrafted reality together.
footer.tagline:
Quality and craftsmanship for years.
Your partner for custom woodwork.
about.hero.title: About us
about.hero.subtitle: A passion for wood, a love for detail
about.s1.title: Craftsmanship with heart and mind
about.s1.p1: As a trained journeyman carpenter, I bring years of experience and passion for the craft. In my workshop, unique woodwork pieces are created that perfectly combine functionality and aesthetics.
about.s1.p2: Every project is a new challenge and an opportunity to bring out the natural beauty of wood. From the first sketch to the final assembly, I personally accompany every step.
about.s1.p3: Quality is my top priority. I work exclusively with high-quality materials and traditional techniques, combined with modern methods to achieve durable and timeless results.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.v1.title: Quality
about.values.v1.desc: The highest craftsmanship standards and careful material selection guarantee long-lasting results that endure for generations.
about.values.v2.title: Individuality
about.values.v2.desc: Every project is unique. We listen, advise honestly and implement your personal wishes with precision.
about.values.v3.title: Sustainability
about.values.v3.desc: Wood is a renewable resource. We prefer regional timber and pay attention to environmentally conscious processing.
about.values.v4.title: Reliability
about.values.v4.desc: Transparent communication, fair prices and on-time completion are a matter of course for us.
about.process.title: Our Work Process
about.process.subtitle: From idea to finished unique piece
about.process.s1.title: Initial Consultation
about.process.s1.desc: In a personal conversation we discuss your wishes, ideas and the spatial conditions.
about.process.s2.title: Planning & Design
about.process.s2.desc: I create detailed sketches and plans, select suitable materials and calculate transparently.
about.process.s3.title: Production
about.process.s3.desc: In my workshop your piece of furniture is created with precision and craftsmanship – step by step.
about.process.s4.title: Assembly & Handover
about.process.s4.desc: Professional on-site assembly and final adjustments complete the project.
about.cta.title: Get to know us
about.cta.text: Visit our workshop or arrange a consultation appointment.
contact.hero.title: Contact
contact.hero.subtitle: Let us talk about your project
contact.info.title: Contact Information
contact.info.intro: Do you have an idea or a concrete project? Please feel free to contact me for a no-obligation consultation.
contact.info.reach.text: You can best reach me by email or phone. I usually get back to you within 24 hours – for calls, of course, immediately.
contact.write.title: Write to us
contact.write.text: Send us an email with your request. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
kuechen.title: Kitchens & Wardrobes
kuechen.subtitle: Custom built-in kitchens and wardrobe solutions
kuechen.s1.h3: Your Dream Kitchen from the Carpenter
kuechen.s1.p1: A kitchen is the heart of every home. At ef-sinn we plan and build fitted kitchens that are not only perfectly functional but also visually stunning. Every kitchen is individually tailored to your space, your needs and your style.
kuechen.s1.p2: Unlike off-the-shelf kitchens from furniture stores, you receive a custom-made solution from us that makes optimal use of every centimetre of your space – with high-quality materials and craftsmanship precision.
kuechen.s2.li1: Fitted kitchens to measure – completely individually planned and crafted
kuechen.s2.li2: Worktops in solid wood, natural stone or your choice
kuechen.s2.li5: Kitchen renovation – new fronts, worktops and fittings
kuechen.s3.p1: We take time for a thorough on-site consultation, measure your space precisely and prepare detailed planning documents. After your approval, we manufacture all components in our workshop and professionally install the kitchen in your home.
kuechen.gallery.title: Kitchens – Impressions
kuechen.gallery.sub: A glimpse into our custom kitchen projects
kuechen.cta.title: Your Dream Kitchen Awaits
kuechen.cta.text: Let us plan your perfect kitchen together – individual, high-quality and made to measure.

terrassen.title: Wooden Terraces
terrassen.subtitle: Weather-resistant terraces for your outdoor area
terrassen.s1.p1: A wooden terrace creates the perfect transition between house and garden. It provides a natural, warm surface for relaxing, barbecuing or playing – and enhances your outdoor area both visually and functionally.
terrassen.s1.p2: At ef-sinn we plan and build wooden terraces that withstand Munich's weather conditions and retain their beauty for years to come. From the substructure to the surface treatment – everything from a single source.
terrassen.s2.li1: Terrace decks in local and tropical timber
terrassen.s2.li6: Steps and ramps for barrier-free access
terrassen.s2.li7: Renovation and refurbishment of existing terraces
terrassen.s3.p1: For terraces we use particularly weather-resistant timbers such as larch or tropical woods like teak, garapa and cumaru. Every wood is pre-treated and prepared for maximum longevity. We are happy to advise you on the best wood choice.
terrassen.gallery.title: Terraces – Impressions
terrassen.gallery.sub: A glimpse into our terrace projects
terrassen.cta.title: Your Terrace – Naturally in Wood
terrassen.cta.text: Plan your dream terrace with us – robust, durable and beautiful.

treppen.title: Staircases
treppen.subtitle: High-quality wooden staircases – individual and crafted to perfection
treppen.s1.p1: A staircase is more than just a connection between two floors – it is a central design element of your home. At ef-sinn we craft wooden staircases that impress through their form, choice of materials and craftsmanship.
treppen.s1.p2: Whether elegantly curved, purist-straight or as a cantilevered structure – every staircase is individually planned and adapted to the structural conditions of your home.
treppen.s2.li4: Cantilevered staircases – modern and light in appearance
treppen.s2.li5: Bolt staircases – floating look with wooden treads
treppen.s2.li6: Staircase renovation – cladding and refurbishment of existing stairs
treppen.s3.p1: Every staircase needs a matching handrail and a safe railing. We craft wooden railings in various styles – from classically turned to modern minimalist. Combinations of wood with stainless steel or glass are also possible.
treppen.gallery.title: Staircases – Impressions
treppen.gallery.sub: A glimpse into our handcrafted staircase projects
treppen.cta.title: Your Staircase – Individually Planned
treppen.cta.text: We are happy to advise you on the options for your new wooden staircase.

moebelbau.title: Custom Furniture
moebelbau.subtitle: Individual furniture that perfectly fits your life
moebelbau.s1.p1: At ef-sinn we create furniture as unique as your home. Every piece is individually planned, crafted in our Munich workshop and assembled on site. From the first sketch to the final adjustment – we accompany you through the entire process.
moebelbau.s1.p2: Whether a solid dining table for the whole family, a custom bed frame, a bookshelf that fits perfectly into the alcove, or a sideboard as a focal point in the living room – we craft furniture that unites function and aesthetics.
moebelbau.s2.li1: Tables – dining tables, desks, coffee tables, conference tables
moebelbau.s2.li2: Beds – solid wood beds, box spring frames, children's beds
moebelbau.s2.li3: Shelves & room dividers – freestanding or as a built-in solution
moebelbau.s2.li4: Sideboards & chests of drawers – individual in size and material
moebelbau.s2.li5: Hallway furniture & coat storage – optimally adapted to your entrance area
moebelbau.s2.li6: Bathroom furniture – washstands, mirror cabinets in moisture-resistant wood
moebelbau.s2.li7: Special furniture – for particular requirements and unusual wishes
moebelbau.s3.p1: We work with high-quality solid woods such as oak, beech, walnut, cherry and ash. Every wood is carefully selected and sustainably sourced. The surface finish – whether oiled, waxed or lacquered – is individually tailored to your needs.
moebelbau.gallery.title: Custom Furniture – Impressions
moebelbau.gallery.sub: A glimpse into our bespoke furniture projects
moebelbau.cta.title: Your Dream Piece of Furniture Awaits
moebelbau.cta.text: Tell us about your project – we advise you personally and without obligation.

innenausbau.title: Parquet Flooring & Interior Fitting
innenausbau.subtitle: Professional floor laying and complete interior fitting with wood
innenausbau.s1.p1: A high-quality parquet floor lends every room warmth and elegance. As experienced carpenters in Munich, we lay parquet floors professionally and ensure a perfect result that lasts for decades.
innenausbau.s1.p2: Whether new installation or refurbishment of your existing parquet floor – we sand, oil and seal parquet floors with precision and care.
innenausbau.s2.li2: Engineered parquet – fast installation, diverse looks
innenausbau.s2.li3: Wide-plank boards – large format and natural
innenausbau.s2.li4: Strip parquet – classic pattern, timelessly beautiful
innenausbau.s2.li5: Parquet sanding – refurbishment of existing floors
innenausbau.s2.li6: Parquet oiling and sealing – protection and care
innenausbau.s3.p1: In addition to parquet flooring, we offer complete interior fitting with wood. Wooden ceilings create a warm ambience, wall claddings set natural accents and ensure a pleasant room climate.
innenausbau.s3.li1: Wooden ceilings – ceiling cladding in solid wood
innenausbau.s3.li3: Sloped ceiling cladding – wood for your loft conversion
innenausbau.s3.li4: Alcove cladding – wooden elements for special spots
innenausbau.s3.li5: Complete room fitting – from planning to completion
innenausbau.gallery.title: Interior Fitting & Parquet – Impressions
innenausbau.gallery.sub: A glimpse into our interior fitting and parquet flooring projects
innenausbau.cta.title: New Floor, New Feeling
innenausbau.cta.text: Let us talk about your parquet floor or interior fitting – we are happy to advise you.

restaurierung.title: Repair & Restoration
restaurierung.subtitle: Valuable pieces of furniture deserve a second life
restaurierung.s1.p1: Whether an inherited family heirloom, an antique secretary or a well-loved chair with signs of wear – we breathe new life into your furniture. Using traditional craft techniques and modern expertise, we restore and repair wooden furniture of all kinds.
restaurierung.s1.p2: We respect the character and history of every piece. Our goal is to restore its original beauty while ensuring its functionality for the future.
restaurierung.s2.li1: Restoration of antique furniture – preserving original substance
restaurierung.s2.li2: Repair of damaged wooden furniture – breaks, cracks, scratches
restaurierung.s2.li3: Surface refurbishment – sanding, staining, oiling, lacquering
restaurierung.s2.li4: Veneer work – repairing or replacing veneer
restaurierung.s2.li5: Replacement parts – reproducing missing fittings, handles, mouldings
restaurierung.s2.li6: Woodworm treatment – professional control and prevention
restaurierung.s2.li7: Upholstery work – in collaboration with specialist companies
restaurierung.s3.p1: Old furniture often has a quality that is hard to find today. Solid wood, hand-carved details and traditional joints – these are values worth preserving. Professional restoration is not only more sustainable than buying new, it also preserves the emotional connection to your furniture.
restaurierung.cta.title: Your Piece of Furniture Deserves It
restaurierung.cta.text: Bring us your piece of furniture or send us photos – we advise you honestly and without obligation.
